pkgmetadata.longdescription: provides client and dns server scripts enabling clients to submit dynamic updates to their dns, in a dual-stack environment including both direct dnsmasq/radvd clients and openvpn clients dnsmasq clients are supported by openrc service and daemon and dhcpcd hook script vpn clients are supported by openvpn.romote|local-up|down.sn --> joetoo-up|down.sh hook scripts

use.flag: install scripts and configs for ddns server (dnsmasq dns)
(server) install openvpn_dns_updater.sh script to update hosts files
(server) install ddns-emaint script to curate dns hosts files
(default) install ddns-updtate script and common configs
install openrc ddns server and ddns-daemon config in conf.d/ddns for ipv4
(default) install openrc ddns server and ddns-daemon config in conf.d/ddns for ipv6
(default) install dhcpcd hook script for ipv4 support
install dhcpcd hook script for ipv6 support (if using dhcpv6)
(to do) install openvpn hook script for ipv4 support (if using openvpn and its up.sh)
(to do) install openvpn hook script for ipv6 support (if using openvpn and its up.sh)
install linux and powershell support for Windows Subsystem for Linux (WSL) client (ipv4))
install linux and powershell support for Windows Subsystem for Linux (WSL) client (ipv6))
